name: education_whistleblower_allegation_kestrel_tru_loy
premise: A gifted program lottery algorithm is being questioned after a neighborhood received zero seats two years running. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education whistleblower allegation kestrel tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Priya Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Priya Nielsen, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Priya Berg
agents.identity: I am Priya Berg, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Priya Nielsen must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Priya Nielsen do?
